Localization.Description: Use of Physmem2profit to create an lsass.exe process memory dump is detected

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Use of the Physmem2profit-like tool {subject.process.name} to create an lsass.exe process memory dump is detected on host {event_src.host}. The file {object.name} was created and an incoming connection from host {src.ip} was established.
